summary: Implemented the players bounded context with team-scoped CRUD endpoints, transactional persistence, player-number uniqueness handling, and integration tests for CRUD, conflict, and tenancy behavior.
reason: Task 05 requires player management inside the team boundary, with auditable mutations, allowed-position validation, and uniqueness of player_number per team enforced in both API behavior and database constraints.
risk: Medium. New endpoints and persistence logic rely on existing players schema constraints and auth middleware context; incorrect route usage or invalid tenancy assumptions would surface as 404/409 behavior changes.
notes: Players CRUD is nested under team routes: /api/v1/teams/{team_id}/players.
Write operations set app.user_id in transactions so existing audit triggers keep mutation traceability.
Conflict mapping handles uq_players_team_number_active and uq_players_profile_image_id_active explicitly.
No schema migration change was needed because the players table and uniqueness indexes already existed.
